name: David Robinson
title: Former NBA Center
bio: American former professional basketball player who spent his entire career with the San Antonio Spurs. Two-time NBA champion, NBA MVP, and Naval Academy graduate known as 'The Admiral.'
faith: Robinson became a born-again Christian during his NBA career and has devoted his post-basketball life to ministry and philanthropy. He founded the Carver Academy, a private Christian school in San Antonio, and is active in various faith-based organizations.
